active_scope: BACKTRADER read-only reference audit after governance read
Native EBTA MVP engine through Phase 8
non_goals: No BACKTRADER modification before governance read
No further native-engine implementation before the generated package remains validator PASS
No new EBTA gate, status, threshold, or methodology

steps.title: Deblocage des prerequis factuels du moteur natif
steps.objective: Make the native EBTA backtest engine plan executable by documenting BACKTRADER read-only access/governance and XAUUSD/NASDAQ data provenance before any implementation phase starts.

Confirmation that BACKTRADER remains reference-only and non-runtime

Phase 1 and Phase 2 can start without implicit assumptions

steps.title: Moteur natif EBTA MVP jusqu'a Phase 8
steps.objective: Produce a native EBTA MVP that loads local XAUUSD/NASDAQ CSV data, decomposes payloads E-I into candidates, runs deterministic native signals/backtests, generates a valid research_package, and exposes Jupyter orchestration notebooks.
entry_criteria: User decision 3A authorized Implementation/ modifications through Phase 8 without Protocole/ changes

tasks.title: Replace external-engine mapping with native-engine mapping
Document payload E-I and data-source audit
Implement native data, payload, signal, backtest, package-builder, and validation path
Add Jupyter cockpit notebooks that orchestrate runtime modules only

completed_steps_archive.title: Encodage runtime de strategie x actif
Socle runtime G-BIAS incidents et registre

risk_register.risk: Archiving an active source could break the EBTA reading path.
risk_register.mitigation: Applications and completed hook/plan/json artifacts were archived only after reference updates; Notes remained active because SOPs cite it.

risk_register.risk: Pipeline pilot work could accidentally add normative EBTA rules.
risk_register.mitigation: STEP_2 reste local a Implementation/, lit des inputs pilotes, ne modifie pas Protocole/ et conserve validate_package_dir comme gate d'acceptation.

risk_register.risk: BACKTRADER reference mining could import external repo conventions into the native EBTA engine.
risk_register.mitigation: BACKTRADER governance was read first; reused ideas are documented as reference-only and rewritten as EBTA runtime contracts without becoming normative doctrine.

risk_register.risk: A multi-asset strategy search could omit losing assets from the WRC family.
risk_register.mitigation: INV-017, candidate_matrix asset coverage, and the multi-asset pilot rejection test fail packages with incomplete strategie x actif coverage.

risk_register.risk: XAUUSD/NASDAQ data provenance could remain implicit and make the MVP non-reproducible.
risk_register.mitigation: User supplied data root D:\TRADING\ENTREPRISE\0 - Phase de lancement\Strategie de trading\0 - Backtest\Data; BACKTRADER_DATA_SOURCE_AUDIT.md documents CSV format, UTC convention, deterministic MVP window, temporal coverage, and the remaining licence/vendor gap.

latest_decision.decision: User answered 1A/2B/3A, then Phases -1 through 8 were executed in Implementation/: BACKTRADER read-only audit, data provenance, native mapping, native MVP modules, valid research_package generation, and Jupyter cockpit without Protocole/ or BACKTRADER modification.
